title: Wireless LAN Controller Architecture
subtitle: Centralized wireless management architecture in enterprise networks

controller.title: Wireless LAN Controller (WLC)
controller.desc: Central brain of the wireless network managing Access Points, WLANs, security policies and client mobility.

devices.title: Access Point 1
devices.desc: Provides wireless coverage and forwards traffic through CAPWAP.

devices.title: Access Point 2
devices.desc: Extends wireless coverage while centrally managed by the WLC.

devices.title: Wireless Clients
devices.desc: Laptops, phones and tablets connecting through enterprise WLANs.

devices.title: Mobility Group
devices.desc: Supports seamless roaming between access points and controllers.
